description: A smiling young man and woman take a close-up selfie together on a white boat deck at sea. The man on the left has short light brown hair, fair skin, wears a light gray baseball cap backward, gray short-sleeve t-shirt, grinning widely showing teeth. The woman on the right has brown hair in a ponytail, smiling with closed-mouth, wearing the same blue-green geometric print sleeveless dress with low neckline. They lean heads close, man's arm around her, her arm extended holding phone. Background features deep blue sparkling sea extending to horizon, distant land silhouette with hills under pale blue sky, boat railing and white deck visible, sunlight reflecting on water. High-resolution image with natural outdoor lighting emphasizing joyful expressions and marine scenery.
key_elements: man with baseball cap and gray t-shirt
woman with ponytail in blue geometric dress
location_context: This image appears to be taken on a small white boat in the Mediterranean Sea near Malta based on sea color, boat style, and distant landforms.
time_context: Early morning around 7:21 AM in late July, suggested by soft sunlight and calm sea conditions.
